title: Find a Product
description: Type what you're looking for - your request will be sent to nearby businesses that have it, and the first one to accept will serve you.
location_permission_denied: Location permission denied. Please enable location services.
location_unavailable: Your device doesn't support location detection.
location_required: We need your location to send this request to nearby businesses.
request_failed: Failed to send request. Please try again.
waiting_error: Failed to load your request's status.
no_response_desc: Try again with a wider search area or a slightly different item.
waiting_title: Sending your request to nearby businesses...
waiting_desc: Please wait - the first business to accept will serve you.
matched_count: {{count}} businesses that may have this item have been notified.
not_claimed_yet: This request hasn't been accepted by a business yet.
